title: 🧩subworkflow - aws ec2 start instance and verify running
description:
Subworkflow to start a stopped EC2 instance and verify it reaches the 'running' state.

Parameters:

instanceIds: (Required) EC2 instance ID(s) to start
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name
guide:
## ▶️ Subworkflow — Start EC2 Instance and Verify Running

Starts a stopped EC2 instance and waits until it reaches the 'running' state before continuing. Used as a recovery or scale-out step.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- **instanceIds** (Required): EC2 instance ID(s)
- **awsRegion** (Required): AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name

ec2_start.name: ec2_start
ec2_start.description: Starts an Amazon EBS-backed instance that you've previously stopped.

ec2_wait_running.name: ec2_wait_running
ec2_wait_running.description: Wait until the EC2 instance(s) are fully running.
